name: Pork Chop Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve beef cube in water and substitute broth for the dissolved beef.
2. Grease a 9x13 inch pan.
3. Spread rice evenly over the bottom of the pan.
4. In a bowl, mix soup, milk, and bouillon (dissolved in 1 cup of water).
5. Arrange pork chops over the rice.
6. Pour the soup mixture over the chops.
7. Bake at 350°F for 1 1/2 hours (COVER).
8. You can use 8 chicken breasts instead of pork chops.
